name: Hardcover
author: Michael Beck
description: Book and audiobook metadata from Hardcover.app, plus reading history import.
fixMatchHint: Paste a Hardcover book, series, or author URL (e.g. https://hardcover.app/books/the-way-of-kings)

background_tasks.description: Looks up metadata from Hardcover for books and audiobooks that haven't been enriched yet.
Re-downloads all Hardcover metadata to pick up updated descriptions, cover images, and ratings.
Imports full reading history, ratings, and want-to-read list from Hardcover.
Imports reading activity added since the last sync.
